description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Bump version that triggers on push to the master branch. The workflow should check if the commit message does not start with 'bump:' and then run a job on ubuntu-latest with a Python 3.x matrix. The job checks out the repository with a personal access token, sets up Python, installs dependencies with pip and poetry, configures the repository, bumps the version using cz bump, and pushes changes back to the repository.
